title: carlina biebersteinii
intro: Carlina biebersteinii, also known as the Carline Thistle, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) that is native to Europe and Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Carlina biebersteinii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and have been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and other conditions.
